summary: Iteration 72: Testing construction/renovation sections, categories with section field, projects with construction fields, AI Designer features. All backend APIs working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Projects page with Ремонти/Строителство tabs, Client dashboard with section type toggle and construction fields, AI Designer with camera capture buttons. Mobile bottom bar centered correctly.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (12/12 Passed) ===
✅ GET /api/health returns status=ok
✅ GET /api/categories returns categories with 'section' field (renovation/construction/both)
✅ GET /api/categories returns 'property_types' array (house, apartment_building, warehouse, office, commercial, villa, other)
✅ GET /api/categories?section=construction returns only construction and 'both' categories
✅ GET /api/categories?section=renovation returns only renovation and 'both' categories
✅ POST /api/auth/register creates client user successfully
✅ POST /api/auth/login authenticates user and returns token
✅ POST /api/projects creates renovation project with section_type=renovation
✅ POST /api/projects creates construction project with property_type=house, land_area=500, building_area=120, floors=2
✅ GET /api/projects?section_type=renovation returns renovation projects
✅ GET /api/projects?section_type=construction returns construction projects
✅ GET /api/stats/live returns live statistics with 56 total free slots
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS (All Passed) ===
✅ Landing page loads with navigation, logo, 'Още' dropdown
✅ Mobile (390x844): Bottom live counter bar is CENTERED (offset 0px)
✅ Mobile: Hamburger menu visible, desktop nav hidden
✅ Login flow works - redirects to /dashboard/client
✅ Client Dashboard: Create project dialog has Ремонт/Строителство toggle
✅ Construction form shows: Тип имот (property type), Парцел (м²), РЗП (м²), Етажи
✅ Projects page: Has Ремонти/Строителство tabs
✅ Projects page Строителство tab: Shows property type filter and construction-specific project details
✅ AI Designer page loads when authenticated
✅ AI Designer: 'How it works' section with 4 steps present
✅ AI Designer: Package selection (69/119/199 EUR) present
✅ AI Designer: Camera capture buttons ('Снимай') visible (3 buttons)
✅ AI Designer: Upload photo buttons ('Галерия') visible (3 buttons)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend CATEGORIES array correctly has 'section' field for all categories
✅ PROPERTY_TYPES constant defined with 7 property types
✅ ProjectCreate model has new fields: section_type, property_type, land_area, building_area, floors, construction_notes
✅ GET /api/categories endpoint correctly filters by ?section= parameter
✅ GET /api/projects endpoint correctly filters by ?section_type= and ?property_type= parameters
✅ Projects page UI has data-testid='projects-section-tabs' for section toggle
✅ Client dashboard create project dialog has Ремонт/Строителство toggle with correct styling
✅ Construction form conditionally renders property type dropdown and construction details
✅ Project cards show construction-specific info (Парцел, РЗП, Етажи) when applicable
✅ AI Designer has camera capture buttons with data-testid='capture-photo-*'
✅ Mobile live counter uses left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 for perfect centering
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed renovation and construction projects via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified all construction/renovation section features: 1) Backend categories have 'section' field (renovation/construction/both) and endpoint filters correctly. 2) Project creation supports construction-specific fields: property_type, land_area, building_area, floors. 3) Projects page has Ремонти/Строителство tabs with correct filtering. 4) Construction view shows property type filter. 5) Project cards display construction info (Парцел, РЗП, Етажи). 6) AI Designer has camera capture buttons and estimated time info placeholder. 7) Mobile bottom bar is perfectly centered.

categories_api.property_types: 7 property types: house, apartment_building, warehouse, office, commercial, villa, other

projects_page_ui.renovation_view: Shows renovation projects without property type filter
projects_page_ui.construction_view: Shows construction projects with property type filter and construction details

client_dashboard.construction_form: Shows Тип имот, Парцел (м²), РЗП (м²), Етажи fields
client_dashboard.category_filter: Categories filtered based on section_type selection

mobile_responsiveness.desktop_nav_hidden: Desktop nav correctly hidden on mobile
